title: Golden Globes 2026: Jessie Buckley Wins Best Drama Actress
text: Jessie Buckley won the Golden Globe for Best Actress in a Motion Picture Drama for her role in Hamnet at Sunday's ceremony. During her acceptance speech, Buckley thanked the film's cast and crew. She expressed her gratitude by saying she would rave in that globe for the rest of her life with them. She specifically acknowledged the collaborative nature of the production, noting that the filmmaking team included a Chinese director, a lot of Irish and mostly Polish crew while telling the story of Shakespeare, described as probably the most famous Brit that ever lived. Buckley also recognized her fellow nominees in the category, including Julia Roberts, Jennifer Lawrence, Tessa Thompson, Renate Reinsve, and Eva Victor. She praised them as incredible women, calling Roberts a hero to us all. The film Hamnet had a successful night, securing six nominations overall. Buckley's win for best actress preceded the film's victory in the best picture drama category, which served as the final award presented at the ceremony.
